query:
INSERT INTO commission_node
                (id, commission_id, parent, type, mode, position, created_by, created_at, payload)
            VALUES (
                $1, $2, $3, 'component', NULL,
                (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position) + 1, 0) FROM commission_node WHERE parent = $3),
                $4, $5, $6
            )
